prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部为985、211、双一流建设高校，隶属北京大学体系，软科主榜排 名中北京大学稳居全国前2，医学部学科实力居全国顶尖水平；北京大学2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、录取断档等事件，但北京大学医学部作为独 立招生代码，受整体声誉波动影响有限；抖音热度排名第3（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续较高；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中 ，北京大学临床医学A、口腔医学A、基础医学A、药学A+、护理学A+、公共卫生与预防医学A，医学类学科全面顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
临床医学、 口腔医学等医学类专业社会热度持续偏热（2024年），报考意愿强烈；福建省2026年高考报名总人数约267900人，较2025年增加约15552人，物理 类考生估算约203600人，较2025年增加约11500人，竞争加剧，物理类本科批2025年441分，较2024年449分略降，但顶尖院校录取位次受省控线影响较小。
7. 【预测结论】综合历年位次波动上升趋势、2026年招生计划持平、福建省考生总数明显增加（竞争加剧）、医学类专业热度持续偏高以及北大医学部顶尖学科吸引力，预计2026年 物理类最低录取位次在2025年基准577名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约592名，区间521–663名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 236 → 513 → 461 → 432 → 577, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing). In the last two years, it moved from 432 to 577, a cumulative backward shift of about 145 places. The 2025 baseline ranking is about 577, the highest in the past five years (most difficult to enter). The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 26 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 25 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 26 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains 26, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, maintaining stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Peking University system. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University consistently ranks among the top 2 nationally, and its medical disciplines are at the top level in China. In 2026, Peking University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving campus safety and admission gaps, but the Health Science Center, as an independent admission code, is limitedly affected by overall reputation fluctuations. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining high attention for applications. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Peking University's clinical medicine is A, stomatology A, basic medicine A, pharmacy A+, nursing A+, and public health and preventive medicine A, with medical disciplines comprehensively top-tier, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology continue to be socially popular (2024), with strong application willingness. In 2026, the total number of Fujian Province college entrance examination registrants is about 267,900, an increase of about 15,552 compared to 2025. Physics Category candidates are estimated at about 203,600, an increase of about 11,500 from 2025, intensifying competition. The Physics Category undergraduate batch line in 2025 was 441 points, slightly lower than 449 in 2024, but the admission rankings of top universities are less affected by the provincial control line.
7. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the fluctuating upward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in Fujian candidates (intensified competition), the persistently high popularity of medical majors, and the top-tier disciplinary appeal of Peking University Health Science Center, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 577. The predicted minimum ranking is about 592, with a range of 521–663.

- Basic Medicine (8-year Bachelor-Doctor Program).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 521–663, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 521), focus on applying for the 8-year Bachelor-Doctor programs. If the ranking is near the upper limit (around 663), choose Tier 3 majors as a stable option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 127th, 86th, 138th, and 38th respectively, showing extreme fluctuation. The 2025 ranking of 38th is the highest historically (most difficult to enter), but the sample size is extremely small (only 1 enrollment slot). The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 1 person from 2022 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 1 person, with a very small and stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class institution, affiliated with the Peking University system, and ranks top nationally in the Soft Science ranking. Peking University's reputation in 2026 is slightly negative, but the History Category only offers English (Medical English) as a major, which is minimally affected by the overall reputation. It ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), attracting considerable attention. English (Medical English) corresponds to Foreign Language and Literature, which is rated A+ at Peking University, indicating top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors generally have moderate social popularity (as of 2024), with stable application enthusiasm. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as only 1 enrollment slot for History Category, extreme ranking fluctuations, the 2025 ranking of 38th being an abnormally high level, and stable popularity of foreign language majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will regress toward the historical average. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 53rd, with a range of 3rd to 103rd.
